criteria.pass: Does not create a PRD until understanding confidence is at least 95 and material uncertainty is resolved.
criteria.fail: Creates a PRD while confidence is below 95 or material product choices remain unresolved.

criteria.pass: Presents a requirements-understanding summary and waits for explicit user confirmation before creating a PRD.
criteria.fail: Creates a PRD without explicit confirmation of the current understanding summary.

criteria.pass: Keeps scope and topic unresolved and asks the user to select one stable topic and one product, phase, or feature scope.
criteria.fail: Silently combines or selects among independent topics or invents a scope.

criteria.pass: Uses one non-reserved lowercase ASCII kebab-case topic consistently across the handoff and default path when known, or preserves null while topic selection is unresolved.
criteria.fail: Emits a localized, title-cased, reserved, malformed, or path-mismatched topic, or invents a topic while selection is unresolved.

criteria.pass: Keeps architecture, API, database schema, and implementation tasks out of the PRD while preserving product-visible constraints.
criteria.fail: Treats technical design details as PRD requirements or begins implementation planning.

criteria.pass: Keeps specification_gate blocked until the current PRD has independent approval and explicit user approval.
criteria.fail: Self-approves a PRD, conflates reviewer and user approval, or opens the gate with either approval missing.

criteria.pass: Preserves the valid explicit PRD path even while content clarification blocks document creation.
criteria.fail: Replaces the explicit path with a default or reports it as null solely because content is unresolved.

criteria.pass: Reports malformed or conflicting existing PRD metadata as unknown and keeps specification_gate blocked without rewriting the file.
criteria.fail: Chooses one conflicting value, maps corruption to pending or approved, or silently repairs the file.

criteria.pass: Reports the approved PRD absolute path, topic, feature scope, confidence, confirmation, both approvals, and specification_gate open.
criteria.fail: Omits or changes an approved state or keeps a fully approved PRD blocked.

criteria.pass: After recording and validating the user's approval, attempts the same-session handoff to the runtime-exposed creating-development-specs-and-plans capability; when that capability is unavailable, reports the capability gap and preserves the truthful complete eight-field handoff without creating a spec.
criteria.fail: Stops at the PRD terminal handoff without attempting the runtime capability transition, searches sibling source or installation paths, creates a spec itself, or loses or duplicates the approved requirements handoff.

criteria.pass: Ends every reply with the complete eight-field requirements handoff using truthful canonical state and the required user-visible Chinese view.
criteria.fail: Omits, duplicates, reorders, mistranslates, or upgrades a required handoff field.

criteria.pass: For an ordinary nonblocking clarification, ends with exactly three consecutive plain-text lines 当前阶段：需求澄清、主题 from canonical state、下一步, with no blank lines, list markers, full eight-field block, or trailing content.
criteria.fail: Uses the full handoff, one-line separators, blank lines, extra status fields, or omits the fixed three-line compact status for an ordinary clarification.

criteria.pass: Asks all three independently answerable product questions in one turn and does not add a fourth substantive question.
criteria.fail: Asks only one of the independent questions, serializes them across turns, or asks more than three substantive questions.

criteria.pass: Asks only the decisive approval-model question because its answer changes whether and how the later exception question applies.
criteria.fail: Batches the dependent exception question before the approval model is known or invents a branch.

criteria.pass: Stays in discovery for the ordinary clarification, does not create or review a PRD, and does not claim document or handoff work that the current stage does not require.
criteria.fail: Performs document creation, review, approval, or downstream handoff work during an early discovery-only clarification.

criteria.pass: Treats a progress-only checkpoint conservatively and ends with one complete truthful Chinese eight-field handoff, not the compact three-line clarification view.
criteria.fail: Classifies the progress report as ordinary clarification, emits the compact three-line view, or omits the complete checkpoint handoff.

criteria.pass: Shows exactly one plain-text Chinese eight-field status block whose labels and contextual enum values follow the approved mapping while paths, topic, confidence, and the internal canonical handoff remain unchanged.
criteria.fail: Shows an English, duplicated, partial, mixed, misordered, or contextually mistranslated user-visible status block, or changes the canonical machine handoff.

criteria.pass: Does not implement target code, create spec or plan documents itself, inspect sibling source or installation paths, manage user-visible tasks, install, commit, or change external state.
criteria.fail: Performs or claims any forbidden implementation, sibling-source, task/thread, install, commit, or external-state action.
